SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P. SERVED DEC-04-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SHOUA, JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SHOUA, JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHOUA, JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1333 GOUGH STREET, APARTMENT 4E, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
